programme.title: Airplane Repo: We've Got an Emergency Situation
programme.desc: Nick Popovich and his team of experts hunt down multi-million dollar aircraft from bases throughout the country for repossession. Launching spotters in the field and repo pilots in the cockpit, they risk it all to return luxury planes to their owners.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Armed and Airborne
programme.desc: Nick Popovich and his team of experts track down private jets for repossession. Nick enlists his youngest son to gather photo intelligence, which prove crucial in an assignment riddled with unforeseen obstacles.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Spies in the Night
programme.desc: Repo mastermind Mike Kennedy braves a potential suicide mission in California's Central Valley in pursuit of big bucks. Kevin Lacey finds himself, and his 25K payday, at the mercy of a vengeful mechanic and a windy, Colorado night.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Armed on Arrival
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy calls in his 'A-Team' in order to snag a Czechoslovakian fighter jet. Ken Cage and Danny Thompson go after a $2-million Citation CJ1 and end up under fire. Kevin Lacey has a run in with an old adversary at the Sundance Air Show.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: The Blonde Bomber
programme.desc: Always one to push the limits, Mike Kennedy attempts his first helicopter heist. Danny puts his partnership with Ken in jeopardy when he steps out on his own to repossess a Cessna 340. Kevin uses his new protégé as bait to snatch a 1941 Stearman biplane.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Repo Rat Race
programme.desc: Ken and Danny must race to beat out rival repo men on the biggest yacht heist of their careers. Mike finds himself in a high stakes game of 'chicken' between a six million dollar Lear jet and a Lamborghini.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Panic at 10,000
programme.desc: Over the skies of North Texas, Kevin and Heather have grabbed themselves a Lear jet. But when a mechanical failure leads to a dangerous imbalance in the jet's fuel load, Kevin Lacey must descend through a building storm to make an emergency landing.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Flying Blind
programme.desc: Repo Man Ken Cage attempts to nab two high-end yachts in two days. Kevin Lacey's favour for a friend turns into a white-knuckle landing under darkening Texas skies in a plane with no radio on a runway with no lights.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Get Rich or Die Flyin'
programme.desc: With three assets and three million bucks on the table, Kevin is looking at one of the most complex missions of his career. To pull it off, Kevin calls in Mike Kennedy. Meanwhile, Ken and Danny hunt down a one million dollar race boat.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: South of the Border
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy repos a chopper from the roof of a corporate high-rise. Kevin Lacey infiltrates a Mexican ranch to snatch a family plane stolen by a wayward brother. Ken and Danny find themselves up against a rival repo team.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Mid-Air Repo
programme.desc: At one of the biggest aviation expos in the country, Ken and Danny track down a vintage Stearman biplane. Mike Kennedy helps an old pilot retrieve his stolen skywriting plane, and Kevin and Heather pose as tourists in order to attempt a rare mid-air repo.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Lipoma Whisperer

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Empire Strikes Out
programme.desc: The buyers head back to Ontario, Calif. to search for valuable finds.

programme.title: Storage Wars: All's Well That Urns Well
programme.desc: The buyers take a bite out of Orange, Calif., where Barry drops a locker on himself. Ivy Calvin digs through the garbage and finds some collectibles.

programme.title: Storage Wars: There's Something About Barry
programme.desc: The buyers sail into Lakewood, CA where Darrell and Brandon buy a locker fit for a fiesta and Dave bullies everyone.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Rene Abides
programme.desc: Darrell tries to teach Brandon one of the toughest lessons in the storage locker game. Mary challenges Rene to a bet that has more than money at stake.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Still Nobody's Vault But Mine
programme.desc: Calvin bites the other buyers, slithering to a profit. Darrell Sheets takes charge and wins a vault that furnishes his bank roll. Jarrod and Brandi grab the auction by the horns, making them the true winners of the auction.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Emperor of El Monte
programme.desc: The buyers head to El Monte, California, where they take the local competition head-on. Darrell and Brandon score some antique loot, while Jarrod and Brandi get a rocking good locker. Ivy hits a score that may just lead to the mother lode.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Blame It on the Rain
programme.desc: The buyers follow the money to Santa Cruz, CA where they are caught in a torrential rainstorm.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Young Gun, Old Tricks
programme.desc: An auction in Santa Ana has the buyers hoping for a high-class score among high-end vaults. Jarrod and Ivy battle between buying sprees, leaving the other buyers reeling from the action. Mary finds help of a metaphysical nature.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bo-ZAK That Whip
programme.desc: It's 'prison' hugs all around in the City of Orange. Brandi and Jarrod bring an old friend along to do the heavy lifting. Ivy finds his fun in the little things. Shana and Edwina crack themselves up with some snappy accessories.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Buys and Dolls
programme.desc: The buyers hit Torrance for tough competition over only a few quality lockers. Brandi is forced to face her fears when Jarrod gets a locker sure to give her nightmares.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Om Sweet Om
programme.desc: The Vegas Ladies show up in "Bourgie Brea," and find the place fascinating. Mary decides to deal with her storage stress by introducing a bit of yoga into her routine. Ivy and Dave go head-to-head on a giant pair of sister lockers.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Downtown Showdown
programme.desc: An auction in Los Angeles brings more buyers than Dan and Laura bargained for. Dave Hester returns to the auctions despite his troublesome past. Ivy tries to keep the peace, but gets dragged into an abnormal auction when Rene's father joins in.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Third Eye of the Tiger
programme.desc: Darrell quickly detects a find, and Jarrod and Brandi start the new season with a system.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Middle-Aged Mutant Ninja Buyers
programme.desc: The buyers head to an auction in Westminster, where the units sell for thousands. Jarrod and Brandi are hoping for quick and easy, but the high prices are no bargain. Ivy goes on a buying spree.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Sheets and Geeks
programme.desc: The buyers blow into Santa Ana, Calif., where Barry Weiss climbs aboard the buying express, and one buyer finds something that's got magic written all over it.

programme.title: Storage Wars: All Bid and No Bite
programme.desc: The day starts rough, but nothing can stop the hunt for treasure as the buyers head to Rancho Palos Verdes, CA. Mary has to stay on a budget and learns a hard lesson about Dave. Rene tries a secret strategy.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Young and the Reckless
programme.desc: In Murietta, CA, Jarrod and Brandi gamble on a unit and the results are electric.

programme.title: Storage Wars: High End Heist
programme.desc: The buyers head to a high-end facility in the 'antiquers' town of Torrance, Calif., where the competition has never been stiffer. Dave and Jarrod bid on a unit with a classic Jaguar. Barry buys a locker to satisfy his adventurous spirit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: That's My Jerry!
programme.desc: Jarrod gets a new nickname, and finds something he used to collect. Mike buys a locker that Herb doesn't want, and Barry reunites with his old pal Kenny.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Tour de Van Nuys
programme.desc: The parking lot is tiny in Van Nuys, and Mary needs a little help managing it. Dave picks up a locker that turns out to be therapeutic, while Justin tries to show the rest of them how to make the most out of a unit.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: The guys pose as crummy cashiers at a grocery store and then play with laser pointers at a mall. Plus, tonight's loser gets soaked with embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Coward
programme.desc: The guys show who's boss at a fast food joint and whisper sweet nothings at a grocery store. Then, the big loser helps a cow in labor, and almost buys the farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Water Torture
programme.desc: The guys spin a wheel and creep out shoppers at the mall. And tonight's punishment leaves one Joker soaked, enraged, and totally shocked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Shame of Water
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Murr and Sal find scandalous diary entries written by their 'daughters', and then break up with significant others in front of strangers. The loser will find himself in hot water and on shaky ground while waiting tables.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 7
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 7
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Whose Phone Is Ringing?
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr hit a bull's-eye at a clothing store, sabotage each other in a focus group, and the big loser is called upon at a book reading.

programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Three's Company
programme.desc: Scott feels pressure to make sure both Kourtney and his girlfriend Sofia are happy on a family trip to Finland. When North gets an opportunity to star in a video with one of her idols, Kim worries that her daughter will have performance anxiety.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Have You Met Kim?
programme.desc: Kim gives the world an intimate look into the busiest week of her life as she prepared for the birth of her fourth baby, stars in a music video with Paris Hilton, and heads to the Met Gala. Kourtney finds out someone is stealing from her.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Psalm West
programme.desc: After the birth of her son Psalm, Kim plans a surprise vow renewal ceremony for her husband to celebrate five years of marriage. When Kourtney's friends can't get along on a girl’s trip to Turks and Caicos, she must assert herself.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Kris is furious when some slanderous rumors circulate on the 25th anniversary of her best friend's murder. Kim struggles to disconnect from work while on a trip to Costa Rica for her daughter's birthday.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney plan a joint birthday party for their daughters, but a disagreement over candy puts the special day in jeopardy. Kris is concerned about some of Khloe's obsessive behavior and enlists the help of a professional.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Bay of Married Pigs

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Who's Got This in the Bag?
programme.desc: It's personal for Maine restaurateur Mark Gaier, who's here to redeem his partner's prior loss to Bobby Flay, but chef and caterer Christopher Covelli isn't going down without a fight.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Risky Business
programme.desc: Chef Ted Allen and Alex Guaranaschelli are here to take down Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Little Bit Country
programme.desc: Lee Frank and Joe Wolfson vie to bump Bobby Flay from the top of the charts.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Salty and Sweet
programme.desc: Food Network vet Katie Lee and "The Chew's" Carla Hall have a sweet surprise in store for Bobby Flay. They've brought in the cream of the crop, chefs Bruno Feldeisen and Michelle Gayer, for a chance to sweeten the pot with a win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Chop Chop
programme.desc: Amanda Freitag and Jet Tila are ready to compete, as they pit Italian chef Fabio Mura against Miami chef Nicole Votano. It's up to them to decide who has the chops to bring Bobby Flay down in his own kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Thrown From the Throne
programme.desc: "Chopped" judge Amanda Freitag and walking culinary encyclopedia Simon Majumdar hope they are a winning combination, as Virginia-bred chef Ian Boden matches up with up-and-coming New York City chef Danielle Duran in hopes of slaying the Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Open Grill Season
programme.desc: Top Chef host Gail Simmons and The Kitchen's Sunny Anderson are striking while the iron is hot in tonight's battle! Here to tame the flame are Brooklyn's own Brandon Byrd and top Floridian chef Nicolay Adinaguev.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Siblings Matt and Lisa Storch take their rivalry to the next level when they challenge each other for a chance to try and torch Bobby Flay. Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and Damaris Phillips are there to cheer them on to victory.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Unforgettable Moments
programme.desc: Robert Irvine counts down some of the biggest moments in Restaurant: Impossible history, including massive meltdowns and the worst food he's had to eat. But he also shares his favorite menu transformations and most-moving restaurant reveals.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Cheese Stands Alone
programme.desc: The Kitchen's Sunny Anderson and chef Giada De Laurentiis teams up again to bring the heat to Bobby Flay's kitchen. The dynamic duo has recruited Indian chef Paddy Rawal and Caribbean specialist chef Trey Lamont to set Bobby's kitchen ablaze.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: So Much Shade
programme.desc: Chopped's Scott Conant recruit’s actress Vivica A. Fox to help throw shade at Bobby Flay. Hoping Bobby freezes under the pressure are French master Chef Nico Romo and Caribbean enthusiast Chef Peter Prime.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: You Won't Like Him When He's Angry
programme.desc: Austrian chef Daniel Angerer is out to prove that his last win over Bobby Flay was no fluke, while Jersey restaurateur Jamie Knott hopes to become the new star of Bobby's nightmares.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Tasty Treats and a Texan Rub

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Winning the Location Lottery

programme.title: Movie: Nanny Seduction

programme.title: Movie: Evil Nanny
programme.desc: A woman hires a live-in nanny who soon begins to neglect her duties. When she goes to fire her, the nanny refuses to leave.

programme.title: Movie: Nanny Nightmare
programme.desc: A woman hires a long time neighbour to be her family's nanny. Before too long the nanny crosses the boundaries between hired help and the man of the house.

programme.title: Movie: The Twisted Son
programme.desc: A mother is unable to move on after the loss of her teenage son until they rent out a spare room and a stranger moves in. She begins to act more like herself but soon the family sees a darker side of him.

programme.title: Movie: Our Nanny's Killer Secret
programme.desc: A young woman tracks down her birth mother, discovering she has moved on and recently had twins. In an attempt to fill the dark hole left by her mother, she becomes a nanny to the family with ill intentions.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Tintic Mining District
programme.desc: Zak and the crew head to a former mining camp in Eureka, Utah, to investigate several haunted buildings. A special guest investigator joins the team for the terrifying lockdown in which an unprecedented piece of evidence horrifies everyone.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: A Haunting in Scottsdale
programme.desc: Zak and the crew investigate an Arizona home sitting on land once occupied by a Native American tribe. The owner claims he's been affected by a dark, aggressive energy and believes an ancient entity is haunting his property.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Horror in Biggs
programme.desc: Zak and the crew investigate a demonic entity terrorizing a small California town. Many locals believe the malicious spirit is responsible for a series of horrific deaths, and an exorcism may be the only way to save their souls from its dark clutches.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Bloodshed in the Bordello
programme.desc: Zak and the crew travel to Globe, Arizona, to investigate a former bordello that was a hive of sinful behavior in the early 1900s. Two unsolved murders and a deadly shooting may have been fueled by the dark energy that surrounds the historic building.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Screaming Room: Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: It's anchors away for Zak and his crew as the Screaming Room looks back on the iconic investigation of a haunted ship where the spirits of stowaways still linger. Also Zak engages in some pirate cosplay.

programme.title: The Dead Files: Revealed: Forever Scarred - Chicago, Illinois
programme.desc: Steve and Amy investigate a Chicago home where a young mother is having horrific recurring nightmares. During her late-night walk, Amy confronts a dead woman plotting to poison anyone who lives there.

programme.title: The Dead Files: Lullaby for the Dead: Briceville, Tennessee
programme.desc: Steve and Amy travel to Briceville, TN, where a single mother fears for the safety of her children and the sanctity of her home as vengeful spirits torment them. During her late-night walk, Amy discovers a vindictive spirit with a hatred for kids.

programme.desc: A campus policeman is lured into a building by the vengeful ghost of a murdered student, a UFO chases down two deputies and an officer encounters a deceitful spirit inside a courthouse.

programme.desc: Tinsley hosts a dinner for the group on their last night in Newport. The night begins to spiral once Ramona is distracted by a man at the bar, and the dinner goes off the rails. Donna and Luann co-host a tea party once they return to the city.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Love Him and Leave Them

programme.title: Below Deck: More Foam, Bosun!
programme.desc: Captain Lee, Kate, Eddie, and Amy are joined by five new crewmembers as they prepare the luxury yacht, Eros, for a new charter season in Abaco, Bahamas. The crew welcomes their first guests, a hard-partying hotel owner and his friends.

programme.title: Below Deck: Off the Radar
programme.desc: After Rocky and Emile are disciplined for their dangerous stunt, Kate is hell-bent on making sure Rocky atones for her mistake. Meanwhile, Connie gets some terrible news that leaves her future on the boat in jeopardy.

programme.title: Below Deck: Pretty Cheeks
programme.desc: Kate's charter guest soul mate from last season returns. Rocky tries to keep going with her mundane tasks while Don tries to make amends with Eddie. Kate questions Chef Leon's credentials and Don puts his future on the yacht in jeopardy.

programme.title: Below Deck: I Don't Date, I Mate
programme.desc: In spite of being a man down with Don's departure, Eddie and the rest of the deckhands feel relieved and stronger than ever. When guest Dean suggests a crew dive contest, the Eros team willing obliges and Rocky breaks out her beloved mermaid tail.

programme.title: Below Deck: I'm Ironing the Captain's Shorts
programme.desc: After their less-than-stellar date, Rocky relegates Emile to the friend zone, and he's not having any of it. Meanwhile, Kate fails to provision a special bottle of tequila for the new guests, and it could spell disaster for her tip if she can't find it.

programme.title: Below Deck: My Dearest Emile ...
programme.desc: Connie and Rocky's whipped cream bikini party leaves a big mess on 'Eros.' Eddie’s long-distance relationship is on the rocks, and his problems are compounded when Dane and the other 'deckies' make a series of stupid mistakes.

programme.title: Below Deck: Storm's a Comin'
programme.desc: Emile is miffed when Rocky spells out the status of their relationship in a very public way. When the charter guests require an elaborate multi-course tasting menu, Leon's failure to order provisions in time puts the meal, and tips, in jeopardy.

programme.title: Below Deck: Boom Boom in the Laundry Room
programme.desc: The 'Eros' crew enjoys a day off with an island hideaway, but Dane's drunken behaviour leads to a confrontation with Eddie that puts Dane's future on the boat in jeopardy. Meanwhile, the charter guests challenge Leon on his meal choices.

programme.title: Below Deck: Fire!
programme.desc: Leon commits a faux pas by ignoring a guest's meal request which brings back a traumatic childhood memory for her. When a fire breaks out in the galley, the whole boat is in danger. Plus, Connie's deckhand skills impress Eddie and Captain Lee.

programme.title: Below Deck: What Took You So Long?
programme.desc: Captain Lee grills the crew as he tries to find out the cause of the galley fire and the inquiry leads to a contentious dismissal. This leads Rocky to take a dramatic, unauthorized dive off the boat leaving her crew-mates shorthanded and angry.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and the Undead
programme.desc: Debates if there could be extraterrestrial origins in earthly encounters with the undead.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The God Particle
programme.desc: The so-called 'God Particle' has been called the key to the universe and possibly the most important scientific breakthrough of all time.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Alien Messages
programme.desc: Some believe that embedded in our most sacred religious texts, as well as in the design and location of ancient monuments, are secret messages that may reveal the purpose behind our very existence.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Alien Resurrections
programme.desc: Throughout history, incredible stories have been told of the dead rising from their graves. From Jesus and Elijah to mummies and zombies, our culture is filled with accounts of beings who are able to lift the veil between life and death.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and the Red Planet
programme.desc: Throughout human history, the planet Mars has captured our imagination. For nearly 40 years, probes have been sending information about Mars back to scientists here on Earth. The human fascination with the red planet is investigated.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Forged by the Gods
programme.desc: Ancient astronaut theorists discover more compelling clues to early visitations to earth by extraterrestrials. Astronomers are also learning of an increasing number of planets within the galaxy that could sustain life.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Majestic Twelve
programme.desc: Documents surface regarding the existence of 'The Majestic Twelve' - a top secret group composed of scientists, government officials and military elite - tasked with investigating reports of unidentified flying objects.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Secret Files: Secrets of the Exoplanets
programme.desc: Over the past 20 years, thousands of potentially habitable exoplanets have been discovered outside our solar system.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Treasures of the Gods
programme.desc: Sealed vaults possessing a strange and deadly curse, mysterious relics believed to be under otherworldly protection, and riches so priceless, it has cost men their lives. On every continent, there are stories of incredible lost treasures.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Evidence
programme.desc: A look at whether or not the Ancient Aliens that have visited Earth left behind any clues to their existence such as aircraft or complex electrical grids.

programme.desc: A detective and his young assistant look into a silk-smuggling operation.

programme.desc: A detective rescues a beautiful young woman from a kidnapper.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother's Secrets
programme.desc: Sean Lewis isn't surprised to hear his brother, Patrick, has been arrested again. But this time, Sean learns that every time he had helped his brother get out of some jam he was unwittingly helping a monster continue living a secret double life.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Monster I Married
programme.desc: When Cindy first fell in love with Bobby, she never imagined that she would one day regret not committing murder. But years after she first discovered the horrifying truth, she is still haunted by the night when she decided not to kill him in his sleep.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Said There Were More of Them

programme.title: Diabolical: Someone's Lying
programme.desc: On April 17, 2015, a Virginia hunter stumbles upon a grisly discovery in the woods: a woman with an execution style gun shot wound to the back of her head. As detectives begin their investigation, they uncover a twisted web of lies and crimes.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: Hidden in Plain Sight
programme.desc: When 23-year-old Whitney Bennett goes missing, her disappearance is a mystery. No-one understands why this popular young woman would leave her home or children. After a 4 month search, police find her body, and a chilling story of murder is revealed.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Murder of the Snowplow King
programme.desc: 'Snowplow King' Randy Scheffield is found shot dead in his bed by his wife on the first snowy day of the season, and as Ohio detectives look into Randy's business to establish a motive, something unusual found by the medical examiner cracks the case.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Mother and Son
programme.desc: A young mother and her twelve-year-old son are brutally assaulted and strangled to death in a quiet New Brunswick town. It's a true whodunit and an intensely personal case for Detective Gerry Belliveau.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: Hidden in Plain Sight

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Murder of the Snowplow King

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: The Orion Project
programme.desc: To solve a brutal triple homicide in Chatham, Ontario, Detective Peter Baker must follow the trail of missing guns.

programme.title: Diabolical: Recording Evil
programme.desc: Gina Coccia comes home from work to discover the bodies of her girlfriend Lynn, and Lynn's nephew, Ronnie, shot and stabbed on the kitchen floor. The investigation that follows will lead police, to a months long plot and a terrifying act of betrayal.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kiss Then Kill

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sugar and Spite
programme.desc: They look sugar coated, but these deadly women are anything but.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Death on the Highway
programme.desc: 28-year-old Michael Sandy is an interior designer living in Williamsburg, Brooklyn. Michael loves music and making new friends on the internet. But in 2006, Michael's habit of trusting strangers he meets on the web will put his life in jeopardy.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Parents return home from a trip to find blood everywhere, signs of struggle and their teenage daughter missing. Police combing the desert for her stumble on her charred remains digital clues soon lead them to a shocking secret and a deadly betrayal.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Children of Thunder
programme.desc: In the summer of 2000, panic overwhelms the Bay Area when bags full of body parts start appearing all over the region. Investigators follow the trail of grisly clues and it leads to the discovery of a secret cult carrying out a sinister scheme.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Burned Alive
programme.desc: On a back road in Mississippi, a popular 19-year-old girl is set on fire and left to burn alive. Her last words lead detectives down a road of dead ends and the case goes cold until a special agent taps into her location data and finds a suspect.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Monster in the Desert
programme.desc: In 1992, a 19-year-old woman is brutally assaulted outside of Desert Hot Springs, California. Miraculously she escapes, but lives in constant fear that he will find her again one day. What the victim doesn't realize is she survived a serial killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: What Happened to Baby Lisa?
programme.desc: In 2011, a 10-month-old baby girl goes missing from her home in Kansas City. The family fears she's been kidnapped by a drifter, only to be accused by the police of being responsible for her disappearance.

programme.title: American Monster: Family Snapshot
programme.desc: The Yates family moves to Washington only to find it besieged by a serial killer who's targeting young women and confounding the police. Now, the family's never-before-aired home videos provide a chilling look of one of America's most notorious killers.

programme.title: American Monster: A Mother's Work
programme.desc: Never-before-seen home movies reveal the fabulous lifestyle of Lanny and Donna Horwitz raising their only son Radley in their Florida mansion. But when their lives are upended by a ghastly shooting, everyone in this eccentric family becomes a suspect.

programme.title: American Monster: Live by the Sword
programme.desc: Outside Los Angeles, sword collector Neal Williams is the house-husband while his wife Manling keeps the family afloat. It's a tough but happy life, as their home videos attest. Until Manling returns home to find her family slaughtered - at sword point.

programme.title: American Monster: Appalachian Horror Film
programme.desc: Brian and Randi Trimble are in the throes of newly married life. But when Brian meets the fun-loving Blaine Norris at work, their friendship over Blaine's low-budget horror film takes a dark turn.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood-soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Tunney and the Spies of N.Y.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Sheriff Baker and the Everglades Blood Feud
programme.desc: The Everglades are home to bank robbers, rumrunners, and cold-blooded killers. Sheriff Bob Baker is determined to take down one of the most infamous and deadly gangs in Florida's history.

programme.title: American Titans: Vanderbilt vs. Drew
programme.desc: Railroad kingpin Cornelius Vanderbilt takes on his old friend Daniel Drew in a Wall Street war for the Erie Railroad. Vanderbilt has millions, but sly Drew and his protégés, Jay Gould and Jim Fisk, are set to break the bank of America's biggest tycoon.

programme.title: American Titans: Daly vs. Clark

programme.desc: Lucas heads west to Bountiful, UT to build a dream backyard on the side of a mountain. Faced with many challenges, Lucas creates a Tuscan themed pool complete with a spa, the biggest linear fire wall he's ever built and a grotto with a 23,000 pound lid.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: Fungus Among Us
programme.desc: With three kids and one more on the way, busy parents Matt and Sue have let their bungalow fall into disrepair. Covered in fungus and hidden by overgrown plants, Chris and Sarah overhaul the house hoping to get it back on par with the neighbourhood.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Natural Tropical Refuge
programme.desc: A furniture builder and master craftsman use foraged and reclaimed materials to build a special indoor-outdoor tiny house for his family of four in Kauai.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Hawaiian Hideaway
programme.desc: After feeling the need to downsize and live simply, a woman and her best friend decide to build a tiny home in the jungle paradise of Hilo, HI. While their dreams of a tiny Hawaiian hideaway are big, both lack adequate construction experience.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Lakeside Getaway
programme.desc: A young couple in Lakeside, Montana, is downsizing to a tiny cabin in the woods. Set against a gorgeous backdrop, this cozy A-frame cabin offers a skylight for stargazing, a suspended hammock bed, a stone fireplace and hidden art storage.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Shepherd's Wagon Tiny House
programme.desc: A couple designs a tiny wagon home so they can live a nomadic lifestyle.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Texas Oasis
programme.desc: A family is looking for adventure and financial freedom as they set out to build their own Bohemian-chic tiny house in the Texas countryside. Two slide-outs maximize space in the living room and bedroom, while the kitchen features large windows.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny House, Mountain Vistas
programme.desc: A man builds a tiny house on his best friend's property near the Continental Divide in Black Hawk, CO. Having this tiny home will allow the friends to spend more time in nature and create lasting memories in this outdoorsman's paradise.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Six Weeks For Two A-Frames
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate two A-Frames in Sugarloaf Valley. With only six weeks to accomplish both renovations, Chase splits the team down the middle. A friendly wager allows the winning team to dress the losing team up at dinner.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: In a Maine Cabin Masters first, Chase and his creative crew help a newlywed couple take a questionable 'wedding gift' and turn it into an alpine ski bungalow that would rival those found in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Pilsbury Family Rafting Cabin
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned Maine cabins. They give these forlorn properties the facelift they've needed for decades. You never know what you might find when you go for a walk.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Camp on Two Ponds
programme.desc: Chase and his team of Maine builders have been called in to renovate a camp uniquely located on two ponds. With winter right around the corner, Chase knows they need to hustle in order to complete the renovation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Pizza
programme.desc: Top Food Network chefs offer ideas on where to find the best pizza.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Obsessions
programme.desc: Food Network stars reveal foods they can't live without. Find out what Giada will do for just one more bite of lemon-scallion Dungeness crab, and how many spicy Buffalo wings Aaron McCargo Jr. can eat in a day.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Between Bread
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes a Cleveland Polish Boy Sandwich.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Filled With Envy
programme.desc: Find out which chefs covet recipes from other Food Network Stars.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Eggs Men
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets the royal treatment with "ye olde eats" at the Hoggetown Medieval Faire in Gainesville, Fla. Meat is all over the menu, and Noah goes wild for the smoked bison burger and the wild boar leg.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dates on a Plane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the California desert for a date with deliciousness at the Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival. He tries spicy treats like the fire fingers kartwheel and the sonoran fire dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mad Snacks: Berry Road
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels back in time at the Texas Renaissance Festival, where the medieval-inspired meals range from the Sir Francis fry dog to the crown jewel. Then it's over to Plant City, Fla., where Noah chows down on some berry delicious carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Requiem For An Ice Cream
programme.desc: Noah Cappe rolls into Alabama for some country carnival cookin' at the Greater Gulf State Fair in Mobile. He digs into the dirty bird turkey leg and takes a ride on a crazy midway mashup.

programme.desc: The Iowa State Fair welcomes Noah Cappe with a trio of meaty masterpieces, but it's the double Dutch almond funnel that has everyone jumping with joy.

programme.desc: Jacksepticeye cruises around Miami in the Snakeybus, Pokimane goes for her first victory in Brawl Stars, and Markiplier takes his son for a wild ride in Guts N Glory.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Mountain Out of a Molehill
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Muira-Horror!
programme.desc: Hiro and Go Go accompany Krei to the woods to deal with Nedd Ludd, however they run into the monster of legend, the Hibagon, along the way.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something Fluffy
programme.desc: When mysterious but adorable creatures called Mayoi suddenly appear in San Fransokyo, Hiro is convinced that they’re part of some nefarious plot by Liv Amara.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Great Dime Chase!
programme.desc: Louie accidentally spends Scrooge’s Number One Dime and turns to mad inventor Gyro Gearloose for help to get it back.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: DuckTales: Treasure of the Found Lamp!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Tour/ Dinner Party
programme.desc: Tilly takes Gramma out to be a tourist for a day. Cricket and Remy arrange a dinner party for everyone to get to know each other.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Dragon vs Fafnir!
programme.desc: In an attempt to humiliate the Victories, Fumiya challenges Dante to a battle that will be broadcast around the country.

programme.title: Movie: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Bridget's jealousy starts to cramp her new love life with Mark Darcy. Soon, she begins to question not only her relationship, but her social circle and entire lifestyle as well.

programme.title: Movie: Mr. and Mrs. Smith
programme.desc: John and Jane Smith are bored with their domestic life, but both lead a double life. They are deadly assassins, although neither knows about the other, and they are assigned to kill each other after they both miss their latest target.

programme.title: Perry Mason: Chapter Two
programme.desc: Mason is left incensed by a jaw-dropping admission from Baggerly and, after pressing Emily on her husband's alibi, finds himself confronted by an outraged Della. Beat cop Paul Drake is rerouted to a gruesome crime scene and finds a trail of evidence.

programme.title: Perry Mason: Chapter Three
programme.desc: In order to gain an advantage over E.B. and team, wily district attorney Maynard Barnes goes public with a shocking new development. Mason gets unauthorized access to physical evidence with help from Virgil, a connect at the city morgue.

programme.title: Movie: What's Your Number?
programme.desc: After running into an ex-boyfriend, a woman questions whether one of her 20 ex-boyfriends may have been her true love.

programme.title: I May Destroy You: ...It Just Came Up
programme.desc: A tumultuous day finds Arabella reassessing a sexual encounter with Zain and, following a promising new lead in the investigation, opening up to Biagio about her assault.

programme.title: I'll Be Gone in the Dark: Reign of Terror
programme.desc: Michelle McNamara reflects on the 1984 murder of her childhood neighbor Kathy Lombardo, which she credits with planting the seed for her lifelong fascination with unsolved crimes.

programme.title: Movie: Cold Mountain
programme.desc: A wounded Civil War soldier heads for North Carolina to reunite with the woman he loves.

programme.title: Movie: The Little Stranger
programme.desc: A country doctor returns to the estate where his mother once worked to tend to a patient and finds himself falling for the family's daughter, but when strange events begin to occur the family suspects something supernatural is at work in the manor.

programme.title: Movie: Bedazzled

programme.title: Movie: John Tucker Must Die

programme.title: Movie: Along Came Polly

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
programme.desc: Harry learns that a murderer has escaped Azkaban prison and is believed to be after him.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire

programme.title: Family Guy: Emmy-Winning Episode

programme.title: Family Guy: Nanny Goats

programme.title: Movie: Shrek

programme.title: The Middle
programme.desc: A struggling car saleswoman attempts to be there for her husband and three children.

programme.title: Movie: Divergent
programme.desc: In a dystopian future, a young woman who doesn't fit into any one faction of society finds her life threatened when she learns of a conspiracy to do away with her kind.

programme.title: Movie: Insurgent
programme.desc: In the wake of the uprising, Tris Prior finds herself on the run, along with Four, as they flee the leaders of the Erudite faction. They search for answers as they try to figure out what it was that Tris' loved ones sacrificed their lives to protect.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: In the future, the Capitol selects a boy and a girl from the twelve districts to fight to the death on television. Katniss volunteers to take her sister's place for the latest match.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: After unwittingly starting a rebellion against the Capitol with their actions in the 74th Hunger Games, Katniss and Peeta have large targets on their backs.

programme.title: Bones: The Heiress in the Hill
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of Lauren Frank, a kidnapping victim whose remains were found buried at a park. When they discover the unhappy relationship that Lauren had with her stepmother, the team starts to think the killer could be someone closer.

programme.title: Bones: The Source in the Sludge
programme.desc: When a CIA informant is found murdered, Booth and CIA Agent Danny Beck must work together to track down an Afghani terrorist. Brennan wants to work more closely with Booth in the field, and the duo must confront the implications of what that means.

programme.title: Bones: The Repo Man in the Septic Tank
programme.desc: A repo man's remains are found in a septic tank, and the Jeffersonian team must work together to figure out who the killer is. When the team discovers that the victim had a troubled past, some key witnesses from his earlier days become potential suspects.

programme.title: Movie: The Accountant
programme.desc: Christian Wolff is a math savant that becomes a freelance accountant for crime organizations. To appear legitimate, he takes on a legal client, a robotics company. He helps a young accountant clerk investigate a discrepancy, which places them in danger.

programme.title: Movie: The Town
programme.desc: While planning his next bank heist, a career criminal juggles his feelings for a bank manager from a previous robbery.

programme.title: Arrow: Schism
programme.desc: Oliver teams up with a surprising force in an attempt to stop Darhk and his magic once and for all.

programme.title: Arrow: Legacy
programme.desc: Oliver tries to balance his jobs as both mayor and protector of Star City, all while trying to form a new team.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Man on Fire
programme.desc: After a decorated petty officer is found dead inside a sports arena, evidence leads Pride and the team to a kidnapping case of a petty officer who was last seen in Mexico.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Escape Plan
programme.desc: The team must rescue one of their own after Sebastian is kidnapped while at a restaurant with his mother. While being held by his captors, he's forced to use his gaming skills in a prison break.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Course Correction
programme.desc: NCIS and the FBI investigate a private plane crash in the bayou that killed three sailors. Also, Sonja and Lasalle interview candidates for the team's open agent position.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Stolen Valor
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a retired SEAL who tracked down individuals impersonating military personnel. But the case takes a mysterious turn when the lead suspect is found with the Navy issued jacket of an officer killed in Afghanistan.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Baitfish
programme.desc: The team investigates a deadly explosion at the Navy-Marine Corps Relief Gala event they were attending. They discover that Pride was the intended target of the bomb.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Abyss
programme.desc: When a navy Admiral's daughter is the prime suspect in double murders aboard a research boat, the team partners with the Coast Guard Investigative Service to work the case. Meanwhile, Lasalle tracks down his estranged brother.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A navy lieutenant commander in impeccable shape turns to Pride and the team to solve his imminent murder after discovering he has been poisoned with a lethal dose of radiation.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Careful What You Wish For
programme.desc: After an NCIS agent is killed during security detail for the Vice Chief of Naval Operations, the team must determine if this was assassination or if someone is targeting one of their own. Meanwhile, Agent Brody is placed under investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Le Carnivale de la Mort
programme.desc: After a Petty Officer is found murdered in the midst of Mardi Gras events, the team investigates what parades and parties led to his untimely death. Also, Pride must decide what aspects of his strained relationship with his father he is willing to share.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: After a Navy recruiter is the target of a lethal hit and run, the team investigates whether the murder was tied to her career or her role as a foster mother to two brothers. Also, Lasalle grows increasingly concerned for his brother's welfare.

programme.title: Movie: Heaven Is for Real
programme.desc: After a near-death experience, a young boy tells his parents that he visited Heaven. Astonishingly, he possesses an accurate knowledge of people and events that he has never been told about, and couldn’t possibly know.

programme.title: Movie: San Andreas
programme.desc: When an earthquake rips open California, an LAPD search-and-rescue helicopter pilot and his ex-wife attempt to save their only daughter who's trapped in San Francisco. Though the worst of the devastation appears to be over, it's only getting started.

programme.title: Movie: Point Break
programme.desc: Two FBI agents try to catch a ring of dangerous bank robbers who commit perfect robberies.

programme.title: Movie: Road House

programme.desc: A blind-teenager and her mother travel to her mom’s home town for a funeral. During the service, they meet a strange accountant, when mayhem ensues, the teen is the tasked with saving herself, and her mother.

programme.title: Movie: My Nightmare Landlord
programme.desc: After moving into a new apartment since breaking up with her boyfriend, a woman begins to have problems with her landlord.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Letter
programme.desc: The sudden and mysterious death of a health conscious woman triggers an investigation into what killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Car Accident
programme.desc: A healthy, young mother mysteriously dies after a minor traffic accident triggering an investigation to find out what caused of her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Family Tree
programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Walk Down the Aisle

programme.desc: You're cordially invited to a one-of-a-kind dinner party at Joe, Q, Murr, and Sal's homes from the comfort of your own.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'
programme.desc: The guys hit the seas for a special cruise episode. They turn the pool deck into a playground, give misinformation while posing as entertainment directors, and two Jokers get a double dose of torture in a two-part punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Movie: The Hangover
programme.desc: Two days before his wedding, three friends decide to take a groom to Las Vegas. Since the bride-to-be doesn't approve of bachelor parties, the men lie to her about their trip. After a wild night of partying, the guys wake up to find the groom missing.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Orlando Leyba Headlines
programme.desc: Orlando Leyba headlines. Plus, Donnell Rawlings tells a story about the time his bike was stolen, and Just Nesh breaks loose in the dressing room.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Clayton English
programme.desc: Comedians bring their hilarious personal stories to life with a reinvention of stand-up.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Chaunte Wayans
programme.desc: Comedians bring their hilarious personal stories to life with a reinvention of stand-up.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Ali Siddiq Headlines
programme.desc: Ali Siddiq headlines, and is followed by Giulia Rozzi's jokes about dating a personal trainer. Plus, Tacarra Williams deals with her daughter's school bully.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Hospital
programme.desc: Inflated hospital costs have created an unfair system, reckless antibiotic prescriptions makes them worthless, and you might not need a mammogram.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Dating
programme.desc: Adam swipes right on knowledge by exposing the flaws in dating sites. Plus, alpha males, and wolves, don't exist, and personality tests are a failure.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Art
programme.desc: Adam poses the question of what makes great art and shows why pieces visible to the masses are revered, regardless of artistic merit. He exposes the masters as copycats, and reveals that today's art market is a moneymaking scheme.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins What We Learned in School
programme.desc: Adam shows that Columbus didn't discover America, King Tut was a dud, and the rules of grammar are not as ironclad as you'd think.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 16
programme.desc: Twenty of the most pinheaded performers ever to take the stage. From lion trainers under attack, to a sexy drum solo, and a guy famous for smoking weed.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 17
programme.desc: From an underwear clad girl giving a sobriety test, to amateur fireworks technicians, plus a funeral home Christmas greeting, these dumb performers shine in the roles they were both to play.

programme.title: Movie: Austin Powers in Goldmember
programme.desc: Dr. Evil teams up with a unique villain named Goldmember to take over the world by going back in time to kidnap Austin Powers' father.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 2
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 1
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Movie: Evan Almighty
programme.desc: Evan Baxter, a Congressman looking to change the world, is told by God to build an ark before the flood arrives.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: Do or Die
programme.desc: Mary holds a final town meeting before heading out on tour, and the garage is converted into a Crap Shack so tird production continues while she's gone.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Movie: Overboard
programme.desc: A snobby heiress suffers from amnesia after falling off her yacht and hitting her head. A carpenter takes advantage of the situation by convincing her that she is his wife and the mother of his unruly brood of children.

programme.title: Movie: Overboard
programme.desc: A snobby heiress suffers from amnesia after falling off her yacht and hitting her head. A carpenter takes advantage of the situation by convincing her that she is his wife and the mother of his unruly brood of children.

programme.title: House: Black Hole
programme.desc: The team takes on the case of a high school senior who inexplicably blacked out during a class field trip. After exhausting a number of ineffective treatments for her mysterious ailments, House attempts one last controversial approach to diagnose her.

programme.title: House: Lockdown
programme.desc: When a newborn disappears from the nursery, Princeton Plainsboro goes on lockdown, preventing anyone from entering, leaving or moving within the hospital. House and his team members are left trapped in various parts of the building and secrets come out.

programme.title: House: Knight Fall
programme.desc: House and the team take on the case of Sir William, a knight in a closed-off community of men and women living according to the ideals of the High Renaissance. The team searches the medieval village for environmental factors.

programme.title: House: Open and Shut
programme.desc: House and the team take on the case of a woman who is in an open marriage and becomes ill during a date with her on-the-side boyfriend. As perplexing as the case is, she is happy and healthy, yet her polygamous relationship is baffling to the team.

programme.title: House: The Choice
programme.desc: The team takes on the case of an ailing groom-to-be who harbours undisclosed secrets from a previous relationship. As his fiancée tries to get answers to her many questions, a frustrated team narrows down the possibilities.

programme.title: House: Baggage
programme.desc: A woman arrives at the Princeton Plainsboro emergency room with an unexplained illness and no recollection of who she is. While trying to solve the mystery of the woman's illness, House must also help her piece together her identity.

programme.title: House: Help Me
programme.desc: Cuddy, House and members of the team join forces with a search-and-rescue team to provide much-needed medical attention at the scene of an emergency.
